LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER - GREGORY R. BROCBANK, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF OPPOSING PARTY COUNSEL REPRESENTED IN OPEN COURT THAT HE DID NOT RECEIVE NOTICE OF HEARING. THE COURT REVIEWED THE FILE AND DETERMINED THAT SERVICE WAS MADE TO THE PROPER ADDRESS. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- DEFENDANT JENNIFER SMITH'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTED BY PATRICK HEARD (GPS)

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jan-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Gregory R. Brocbank, Esq. 491-0616 for Plaintiff opposing party
Counsel represented in open court that he did not receive notice of hearing. The Court reviewed the file and determined that service was made to the proper address. Tentative ruling adopted -- defendant JENNIFER SMITH's demurrer is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. (JJM) Patrick Heard, CSR 11055
